name: llama-switcher
description: Control the local Llama Switcher tray app to start, stop, restart, rescan, and switch llama.cpp server profiles. Hermes Agent uses this skill instead of running .cmd/.bat/.ps1 files directly.

tools.name: llama_switcher_status
tools.description: Check which llama.cpp server profile is currently running.

tools.name: llama_switcher_list_profiles
tools.description: List detected llama.cpp profiles from the configured scripts folder.

tools.name: llama_switcher_rescan
tools.description: Rescan the scripts folder for llama.cpp startup files.

tools.name: llama_switcher_switch_by_alias
tools.description: Switch to a llama.cpp profile using a human-readable alias such as Qwen-27B MTP.

tools.name: llama_switcher_switch_by_name
tools.description: Switch to a llama.cpp profile using model and feature.

tools.name: llama_switcher_restart
tools.description: Restart the currently running llama.cpp server profile.

tools.name: llama_switcher_stop
tools.description: Stop the currently running llama.cpp server.

tools.name: llama_switcher_open_dashboard
tools.description: Open the Llama Switcher dashboard window.
